_comment: Canonical enum values for the CNS node model. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. Consumed by scripts/validator.py (Python, as sets) and cortxt/packages/cns-schema (JS, generated via its generate.mjs). Array order is semantic (progression where applicable) and preserved on the JS side. Retired enums (statuses/stages/mvp_stages/risk_categories) were removed in the health-scorecard work — node lifecycle/maturity is delegated to board, and per-entity health is derived at read-time (see scripts/health.py), not declared. Legacy layer/pipeline/family enums are likewise NOT here.
